title: Body-Worn Camera Footage Request – January 2026 Incidents

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act (O.C.G.A. § 50-18-70), I am requesting access to body-worn camera footage from officers involved in incidents occurring between January 1 -February 1 2026

Specifically, I am requesting footage related to:

• Traffic stops resulting in arrest
• DUI arrests
• Use of force incidents
• Officer-involved shootings
• High-speed pursuits

If available, please also include any related dash camera footage and incident reports associated with the requested footage.

I prefer the records in electronic format via download link or email.

If any portion of the records are exempt from disclosure, please provide the non-exempt portions and cite the specific legal exemption under Georgia law.

Please notify me if fees exceed $25 before processing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Rosalind M Woods
